zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Wentworth於大約1375年出生在英國素福爾可內特萊斯亞德時，他的父親Sir John Wentworth32歲，母親Agnes Dronsfield3歲。他於1423年6月25日之前與Margery Despenser在英國越可爾明布盧結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1452年10月24日在英國英格蘭素福爾可內特萊斯亞德享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Wentworth was born about 1375, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir John Wentworth, was 32 and his mother, Agnes Dronsfield, was 3. He married Margery Despenser before 25 June 1423, in Hemingbrough, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1415. He died on 24 October 1452, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Wentworth est né environ 1375, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Wentworth, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes Dronsfield, avait 3 ans. Il a épousé Margery Despenser avant 25 juin 1423, à Hemingbrough, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé le 24 octobre 1452, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Wentworth um 1375 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Wentworth 32 und seine Mutter Agnes Dronsfield 3. Er hat vor 25. Juni 1423 in Hemingbrough, Yorkshire, England Margery Despenser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 24. Oktober 1452 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margery Despenser prima del 25 giugno 1423, nel Hemingbrough, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Morì il 24 ottobre 1452, nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Wentworthが約1375年にイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで生まれた時，父Sir John Wentworthは32歳，母Agnes Dronsfieldは3歳であった。1423年6月25日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアヘミングブロウでMargery Despenserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1452年10月24日にイギリスイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Wentworth(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Wentworth(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Dronsfield(은)는 3세였다. 그는 1423년 6월 25일 이전 영국 요르크실르 헤밍브루그h에서 Margery Despenser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1452년 10월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Wentworth nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Wentworth, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Dronsfield, tinha 3 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Despenser antes 25 de junho de 1423, em Hemingbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1452, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Wentworth родился около 1375 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Wentworth было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Dronsfield, 3. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Despenser перед 25 июнь 1423 г. в местности хемингброую, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 24 октября 1452 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margery Despenser antes de 25 de junio de 1423, en Hemingbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1452, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
